snippet.title: Honeywell’s Global Strategy & High-Growth Emerging Markets | Vimal Kapur | Sharma India Lecture
snippet.description:
In this discussion, Vimal Kapur, President and newly appointed Chief Executive Officer of Honeywell, shared his thoughts on Honeywell's Global Strategy and High-Growth Emerging Markets as part of the Center for Emerging Vivek and Vandana Sharma India Lecture Series.

 

As President and Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of Honeywell, Vimal creates new solutions to help customers drive their sustainability transformations and accelerate their digital transformation journeys. In addition, Vimal oversees Honeywell's operating system, Honeywell Accelerator, and oversees Honeywell's five strategic business groups.

 


Learn more: http://www.damore-mckim.northeastern.edu/

Follow us on:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DAmoreMcKim  
Instagram: https://instagram.com/DAmoreMcKim
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/edu/school?id=18507 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/nu_business

snippet.title: I have a lot of passion for sustainability, says incoming Honeywell CEO Vimal Kapur
snippet.description:
Mad Money host Jim Cramer talks to outgoing Honeywell chairman and CEO Darius Adamczyk, who's stepping up to be executive chairman, and the man who's taking over, president and COO Vimal Kapur about the company's future. snippet.title: Vimal Kapur named Honeywell CEO | Diya TV News
snippet.description:
VIMAL KAPUR NAMED HONEYWELL CEO
Indian American Vimal Kapur will take over as Honeywell CEO. He has more than three decades of experience leading the diversified manufacturer's various businesses. The 57-year-old Kapur will take over the top role on June 1, roughly 10 months after he was appointed Honeywell's president and chief operating officer.


TEJAL MEHTA JOINS MASSACHUSETTS DISTRICT COURT
In Massachusetts, Indian American Tejal Mehta has taken the oath to become the first justice of the Ayer District Court. She has served as an associate justice with the same court and promised to make a real impact to the community and treat people with compassion.


"THE ELEPHANT WHISPERERS" WINS OSCAR FOR SHORT DOC
Director Kartiki Gonsalves and producer Guneet Monga  claimed Oscars after their short documentary "The Elephant Whisperers" won at the Academy Awards. The documentary focuses on an orphaned elephant in the care of a couple and is the first Indian documentary to win in this category.

#VimalKapur #Honeywell #TejalMehta #TheElephantWhisperers #oscars 

Find Diya TV previews, promos, clips, and digital exclusives here.

Diya TV ®
Enlighten. Entertain. Inspire.™

Shereen Bhan speaks with Honeywell's Vimal Kapur as yet another Indian CEO takes over the corner office of a top American MNC. In his 1st interview since taking over, Kapur talks about his global outlook, demand, India opportunities, energy, climate transition & more.
